extraction.one_line_summary: JUNGELS Bob soloed to victory from a 20+ rider breakaway after attacking on the penultimate climb with 65km to go.
tactical_patterns: URAN's team UAE Emirates controlled breakaway gap solely because URAN was <3:30 behind in GC, forcing tempo work.
JUNGELS attacked penultimate climb at 65km remaining, then extended advantage on 90kph descent using superior cornering technique.
POGACAR stole bonus seconds at finish line ahead of VINGEGAARD/THOMAS despite non-selective stage, revealing aggressive bonus hunting pattern.

rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: First Tour stage win after years without proper victory and health problems, descending at 90kph decisively gapped chasers.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Lost half-minute lead to JUNGELS in final 2km despite being on native French roads anniversary of first Tour win.
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: positive: Briefly took KOM jersey lead mid-stage by following JUNGLES attack, showing opportunistic positioning in breakaway.
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: neutral: Presence in break at 3:30 GC deficit forced UAE to control gap, revealing threshold where GC teams must react.
